name: tunnel-vision
title: Tunnel Vision
description: Lock onto a single goal. A deliberately obtrusive, glowing green focus HUD pins your goal (and an optional countdown) to the top of your screen — and gets out of the way only when you actively reach for it.
author: jacob

commands.name: start-tunnel-vision
commands.title: Start Tunnel Vision
commands.subtitle: Tunnel Vision
commands.description: Enter a goal and an optional timer, then engage the focus overlay.

commands.name: place-tunnel-vision
commands.title: Place Tunnel Vision
commands.subtitle: Tunnel Vision
commands.description: Drag and resize where the focus overlay appears on screen.

scripts.build: npm run build:overlay && ray build -e dist
